name: tpl-manufacturing-qc
description: Quality defect workflow: receive MES inspection data, analyze root cause, create NCR, draft and send SCAR to supplier, verify response

steps.prompt: Analyze the manufacturing defect data for product {{product_id}}, batch {{batch_number}}, detected at inspection station {{inspection_station}}. Defect type: {{defect_type}}. Full MES inspection output: {{steps.receive-inspection-data.output}}. Produce: (1) severity — one of 'critical', 'major', or 'minor' based on impact to safety, function, and customer experience; (2) root_cause — the most probable root cause with supporting evidence from the inspection data; (3) affected_quantity — estimated number of units affected; (4) containment_action — immediate steps to prevent further defective units from reaching customers; (5) supplier_implicated — true or false, whether this defect traces to incoming material from {{supplier_name}}. Output as plain text with labeled sections.

steps.notifyMsg: Minor defect logged for product {{product_id}}, batch {{batch_number}} (station: {{inspection_station}}). Root cause: {{steps.analyze-defects.output.root_cause}}. Affected quantity: {{steps.analyze-defects.output.affected_quantity}}. No NCR required — added to trend tracking.

steps.prompt: Draft a formal Supplier Corrective Action Request (SCAR) to send to {{supplier_name}} ({{supplier_email}}) regarding defects found in product {{product_id}}, batch {{batch_number}}. NCR number: {{steps.create-ncr.output.ncr_id}}. Defect type: {{defect_type}}. Severity: {{steps.analyze-defects.output.severity}}. Root cause analysis: {{steps.analyze-defects.output.root_cause}}. Affected quantity: {{steps.analyze-defects.output.affected_quantity}}. The SCAR must include: (1) a clear problem statement with reference to the NCR; (2) a request for the supplier's root cause analysis within 14 days; (3) required corrective and preventive actions (CAPA); (4) a request for an updated inspection plan; (5) consequences of non-response. Tone should be firm but professional. Length: 300-400 words.

steps.notifyMsg: SCAR escalation required for NCR {{steps.create-ncr.output.ncr_id}}. Supplier {{supplier_name}} ({{supplier_email}}) response status: {{steps.send-scar.output.supplier_response_status}}. Product: {{product_id}}, batch: {{batch_number}}, severity: {{steps.analyze-defects.output.severity}}. Procurement and quality management notified — consider supplier qualification review.

Quality defect resolved. NCR {{steps.create-ncr.output.ncr_id}} closed. Product: {{product_id}}, batch: {{batch_number}}. Supplier {{supplier_name}} submitted adequate CAPA. Root cause: {{steps.analyze-defects.output.root_cause}}. Affected quantity: {{steps.analyze-defects.output.affected_quantity}} units. Quality team and procurement notified.
